title: Reading the Fine Print
description: A booth has appeared next to Ye Olde Medieval Surplus: ORRERY LIFE COACHING — By Appointment or Walk-In. Madame Orrery is inside, wearing business casual. She has noticed something the HOA is hiding. She'll share — after you help with a small licensing problem.

offer.speaker: Madame Orrery
offer.text: Ah. Your energy profile is familiar. Very familiar. From — let us say from a previous engagement, and leave the geometry out of it.

offer.speaker: Madame Orrery
offer.text: I have a problem. The HOA filed a complaint against my business license, citing a form I have never heard of. Form 77-Gamma: Itinerant Wisdom Services. In thirty years of itinerant wisdom, no one has ever asked me for a form.

offer.speaker: Madame Orrery
offer.text: Fetch me this form and I will tell you what I have noticed about this neighborhood. And I have noticed a great deal. Noticing is the business.

accept.speaker: Madame Orrery
accept.text: The form lives at the Community Center, which requires a resident ID to enter, which I do not have, because I am — as the complaint correctly notes — itinerant. The mail carrier can issue visitor credentials. She will want a favor. She always wants a favor. It's how she stays sane here.

decline.speaker: Madame Orrery
decline.text: No? The booth will keep. Bureaucracy has more patience than either of us. Find me when the fine print finds you.

in_progress.speaker: Madame Orrery
in_progress.text: Forty-seven pages, I'm told. Pages three through forty-six identical. Whoever wrote that form was not writing a form. They were building a wall out of paper.

ready_to_turn_in.speaker: Madame Orrery
ready_to_turn_in.text: You have it. Page forty-seven. Read me the exemption clause — slowly. I want to enjoy this.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: 'Exemption granted for any vendor with documented inter-dimensional licensing.' Filed. Stamped. I am, it turns out, the single most compliant business in Maple Heights.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: Now. What I noticed: the Coordinator's memos reference calibration reports that predate this neighborhood by at least thirty years. Whoever built this place built it to specification. The specification existed before the place.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: Keep that somewhere safe in your head. And take my summary — every consultation comes with a summary. Section four is for you.

locked.speaker: Madame Orrery
locked.text: We've met — or we will have. Your card is missing a mark it should already have. Go back for it. Sequence matters more here than either of us would like.

objectives.description: Get a visitor credential for the Community Center.

unlocks_dialogue.note: W3 chain step: precision futures consultation in Brasston, seven-second mandatory appointment delay.

cross_world_connection: Chain A step 2 of 6. The world2_orrery cutscene (fired at turn-in via cutscene_on_complete) grants life_coaching_summary and advances fool_card_marks to 2. The pre-neighborhood calibration reports lore seeds the Coordinator reveal.
_wiring_notes: DEDUP RULE (cowir-main msg 2299): all item grants + fool_card_marks advancement live in the world2_orrery cutscene — this quest authors NO overlapping rewards (exp only). Step 2 emitter quest_world2_fine_print_credential_obtained, multi-path: (a) mail carrier's favor — find her missing package (defeat rogue_mailbox encounter, recover contents from a neighbor's yard), (b) Cleric-lead: the Community Center receptionist assumes any healthcare worker is pre-approved — credential free, no favor ('nobody questions this because the assumption has never been challenged'). Step 3 emitter quest_world2_fine_print_form_obtained: front-desk interact with credential. ROGUE SHORTCUT (design doc): a Skater Kid lead can enter the Community Center database via the back entrance, skipping the errand entirely — wire it to set BOTH step-2 AND step-3 flags at once (sequence preserved, shortcut honored) plus quest_world2_fine_print_rogue_gap_used; Orrery's turn-in gains a line when that flag is set: 'You found the gap. There's always a gap. That's either reassuring or troubling, I haven't decided.' The world2_orrery cutscene's own legacy progress flags (world2_orrery_find_credential / world2_orrery_mailbox_errand) are superseded by this quest's flags — cutscene plays as pure turn-in cinematic. Ordering fix 2026-07-09 (cowir-main): prereq_flag world1_orrery_complete enforces the sequential chain — steps 2-5 were orderless, letting a skip-ahead player hard-set marks out of order (early-armed finale / regressed counter).
